config.script:
#ifdef _LABELMARKET function run doc_.postcommand "varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=60315 vn101=2 vn102=1 varNewThread=1" end function #endif #ifdef _SECURITY function run doc_.postcommand "varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=43418 varNewThread=1" end function #endif
function fopen doc_.getmodule(60253).gm_ensure_accuracy_ui(false) fopen = false end function
